benefits.description: Able to eat again without throwing up; moved from minimal food intake to regaining weight and sleeping at night
Healing of extensive stomach damage from repeated self-injury

protocol_notes: User escalated BPC-157 doses well beyond standard dosing due to severe GI condition: started at 1mg daily for months, then escalated to 1mg 3x daily, then 3mg morning + 3mg noon + 4mg night (total 10mg daily). SQ injections with oral L-arginine 3g daily. User has 20 years of peptide experience since 2006 (when CJC came out), was well-informed on BPC-157 efficacy from decade of previous use. User explicitly states this was a desperate 'hail mary' approach and does not recommend others follow this protocol. Mentioned buying grey market in bulk.
